SELECT toDecimal32OrNull(value, 2) AS decimal_value, toTypeName(decimal_value) FROM test_table;
SELECT toDecimal32OrNull(toString(value), 4) AS decimal_value FROM test_table WHERE value NOT LIKE 'Inf' AND value NOT LIKE 'NaN';
SELECT a.value, toDecimal32OrNull(toString(a.value), 5) AS decimal_value, toTypeName(decimal_value) FROM test_table AS a WHERE a.value IN ('123.456', '-100.001', '256');
SELECT value, toDecimal32OrNull(value, 3) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE value LIKE '-%') AS subquery1;
CREATE TABLE second_table (id UInt32, decimal_value Nullable(Decimal(9, 2)));
INSERT INTO second_table SELECT id, toDecimal32OrNull(value, 2) FROM test_table;
SELECT a.value, b.decimal_value FROM test_table AS a JOIN second_table AS b ON toString(a.value) = toString(b.decimal_value);
SELECT value, toDecimal32OrNull(toString(value), 1) AS decimal_value FROM (SELECT value FROM test_table) AS subquery2 WHERE decimal_value IS NOT NULL;

SELECT MAX(toDecimal32OrNull(value, 0)) AS max_decimal, MIN(toDecimal32OrNull(value, 0)) AS min_decimal FROM (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE value NOT LIKE 'Inf' AND value NOT LIKE 'NaN') AS filtered;
SELECT value, toDecimal32OrNull(toString(CAST(value AS Float64)), 3) FROM test_table WHERE toDecimal32OrNull(value, 3) IS NULL;
